reason: Agent successfully used GitHub tool to identify the user and returned their GitHub username.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing QA-20260318-232517-mkg0 agent.
Clicked on QA-20260318-232517-mkg0 agent in sidebar — Agent landing page loaded with status showing "idle".
Verified agent status is "idle" — Confirmed in both the agent detail view and sidebar.
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message was entered and sent successfully, agent status changed to "working".
Waited for account access request card — Card appeared within a few seconds asking to grant GitHub account access.
Selected GitHub account checkbox — Checkbox was marked as checked and "Grant Access" button became enabled showing "Grant Access (1)".
Clicked Grant Access button — GitHub account access was granted and agent resumed processing.
Waited up to 4 minutes for response — Agent completed in 37 seconds and returned final response.

Verified response includes GitHub username — Response clearly displays "Your GitHub username is yiw190. You're on a GitHub Pro plan with 3 public repos and 12 private repos, and you have 2FA enabled."
Took final screenshot — Full page screenshot captured showing the complete conversation and GitHub username response.
